overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western video game (Red Dead Redemption 2). The player character observes a bear through a cabin window before exiting into a rainy night in a frontier logging camp. The character walks through muddy streets illuminated by warm lantern light, encounters a man in a red coat, and watches a horse-drawn carriage pass by in the downpour.

events.description: camera moves from inside cabin to covered porch, revealing rainy exterior environment
transition from warm interior lighting to darker exterior illuminated by distant lanterns

agents.ego_description: observing a large bear through the window from inside a cabin, then moving outside onto the covered porch

notable_agents.action: large grizzly bear standing inside the cabin room visible through the window panes

lit chandelier with multiple candles hanging from the cabin ceiling
wooden overhang of the cabin porch providing shelter from the rain
wet muddy street with visible wagon ruts illuminated by distant street lamps

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a wooden cabin, looking through a window at a large bear standing in a warmly lit room with a chandelier. The camera then pans left and moves through the window frame onto a covered porch, transitioning from the dry interior to the rainy exterior. The warm interior lighting gives way to the dark, rain-soaked environment outside, with muddy roads and distant lanterns becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy frontier town street with wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the muddy streets of the frontier town in heavy rain, passing wooden cabins and street lamps

entered.detail: two-story wooden log cabin with warm light glowing from windows
wooden post with lit lantern illuminating the muddy road
rough-hewn wooden fence lining the property boundary

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the muddy streets of a frontier settlement during a heavy downpour. Wooden cabins with warm lantern light line the path, contrasting with the dark rainy night. The ground is thick with mud and wagon ruts, and the rain creates a hazy atmosphere around the street lamps. No other people are visible in this quiet, rain-soaked town.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk along stream with water wheel

events.description: passing by a large antler rack mounted on a fence post near the path

agents.ego_description: walking along wooden walkways and muddy paths near the water, passing an antler display and approaching a water wheel building

entered.detail: large set of elk or deer antlers mounted on a wooden fence post
large wooden water wheel attached to the side of a building, partially illuminated
flowing water alongside the wooden walkway, reflecting the dim light
elevated wooden boardwalk with railings running alongside the stream

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wooden boardwalk next to a flowing stream in the heavy rain. A large antler rack is mounted on a fence post nearby, and a wooden water wheel is visible on a building to the left. The rain is falling heavily, creating ripples on the surface of the water and wetting the wooden planks of the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy intersection with NPC and carriage traffic

events.description: man in red coat appears standing by the wooden fence with arms crossed
horse-drawn carriage with two horses approaches and passes by on the muddy road

agents.ego_description: standing near a man in a red coat, watching a horse-drawn carriage pass by in the heavy rain

notable_agents.action: man in red duster coat and hat standing with arms crossed near the fence, looking around
red enclosed stagecoach carriage pulled by two horses moving along the muddy street

segments.scene_description: The character encounters a man in a red coat standing by the fence in the heavy rain. Shortly after, a red horse-drawn carriage pulled by two horses approaches and passes by on the muddy road, moving through the rainy night. The scene is illuminated by the carriage lamps and street lights, with the rain continuing to fall heavily throughout the encounter.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the dry warmth of a cabin interior into the immersive, rain-soaked atmosphere of a frontier logging camp. It begins by looking through a window at a large bear under a chandelier before panning left and stepping through the frame onto a covered porch, where the warm indoor glow is replaced by a dark, rainy night. As the camera moves forward, the scene expands into muddy streets lined with wooden cabins and hazy street lamps, eventually shifting toward a wooden boardwalk beside a flowing stream and a rotating water wheel. The journey continues past a mounted antler rack before encountering a man in a red coat standing by a fence. Finally, the perspective lingers as a red horse-drawn carriage pulled by two horses passes through the heavy downpour, illuminated by the flickering light of carriage lamps.
